summary: Tested Master File and DB Backup features. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Master File page accessible to all users with RBAC (Add/Edit/Delete buttons only for admin). DB Backup page accessible only to admin. Bank and Agent dropdowns working in MIS and Loan forms.
passed_tests: GET /api/master/banks - Returns sorted list of banks
GET /api/master/agents - Returns sorted list of agents
GET /api/backup/stats - Admin can get collection stats
GET /api/backup/download - Admin can download JSON backup
UI: Master File page accessible via sidebar (nav-master-file)
UI: DB Backup page accessible via sidebar for admin only (nav-db-backup)
UI: Add Bank/Agent buttons visible only for admin
UI: Agent can view Master File but cannot add/edit/delete
UI: Bank dropdown in MIS Add Entry form
UI: Agent dropdown in MIS Add Entry form

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Master File and DB Backup features verified)

bank_names_section.list_visible: Yes - shows all banks sorted alphabetically

agent_names_section.list_visible: Yes - shows all agents sorted alphabetically

db_backup_page.stats_card: Shows collection counts (users, loans, schemes, statuses, master_banks, master_agents)

dropdown_integration.mis_form_bank: Yes - Select dropdown with master banks
dropdown_integration.mis_form_agent: Yes - Select dropdown with master agents
dropdown_integration.loan_form_bank: Yes - Select dropdown with master banks (when master data exists)
dropdown_integration.loan_form_agent: Yes - Select dropdown with master agents (when master data exists)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Master File and DB Backup features fully tested. Backend endpoints for /api/master/banks, /api/master/agents, /api/backup/stats, /api/backup/download all working correctly. RBAC verified - admin can CRUD master data and access backup, agent can only view master data. Dropdowns in MIS and Loan forms use master data when available. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_master_backup.py covers all scenarios.
